title: Number of Islands
prompt: Count maximal connected groups of '1's in a 2D grid (4-directional).
hints: Each unvisited land cell starts a new island; flood-fill it before moving on.
Mark visited cells in place to save space.

alternatives.note: Useful for streaming variants like LC 305.

pitfalls: Recursive DFS can stack-overflow on a 300x300 all-1 grid; switch to iterative BFS for safety.
Counting diagonal neighbors as connected (problem says they're not).
followups: Number of Islands II (LC 305) — dynamic, use Union-Find.
